name: Inside The Bar
description:
In this corner of the bar, you see a temperamental jukebox and a very old
player piano.  On the wall you see a picture of Geronimo, hung here in loving
memory of Coach Ernie Pantuzzo.  To the north are the bar stools, to the west
is the Office to Cheers, behind a door.  To the east, you see the stairs to
Melville's Restaurant.
